**⚠️ READ THIS BEFORE SUBMITTING ⚠️**

Thank you for your interest in LOCKON SDA! 

Please be advised that this repository is the **Legacy/Demo** version of the project. It is currently frozen and serves only as a historical proof-of-concept.

**We are not accepting any bug reports or feature requests for this codebase.**

The project has evolved into an Enterprise SaaS suite. Please close this issue, as it will not be monitored or addressed. Thank you!
